mapper.select:
SELECT id, workflow_id, workflow_version, workflow_name, status, trigger_type, input_params, output_result, current_node_id, completed_nodes, total_nodes, completed_count, started_at, finished_at, duration_ms, error_message, error_node_id, created_by, created_at FROM workflow_instance
AND workflow_id = #{workflowId} AND status = #{status}
AND workflow_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO workflow_instance (workflow_id, workflow_version, workflow_name, definition_snapshot, status, trigger_type, input_params, current_node_id, completed_nodes, total_nodes, completed_count, created_by, created_at) VALUES (#{workflowId}, #{workflowVersion}, #{workflowName}, #{definitionSnapshot}, #{status}, #{triggerType}, #{inputParams}, #{currentNodeId}, #{completedNodes}, #{totalNodes}, #{completedCount}, #{createdBy}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE workflow_instance SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
